headline: What Could Push JNJ Stock Higher From Here?
summary: While the market fixates on the STELARA patent cliff, the rest of the business is quietly accelerating. Excluding the legacy drug, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) grew in double digits for the quarter. The Innovative Medicine segment absorbed a massive 920 basis point headwind from STELARA, yet still posted 7.4% growth. This is not a company treading water, but a portfolio already hitting its next stride.

headline: Pfizer Oncology Data Underscore Survival Gains And Valuation Debate
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) reported Phase 3 data for BRAFTOVI in BRAF V600E-mutated metastatic colorectal cancer and TALZENNA in HRR-mutated metastatic prostate cancer. The company presented the long term results at ASCO and published them in leading medical journals. The data show meaningful survival benefits in high-need cancer populations and reinforce Pfizer’s oncology positioning. For investors following NYSE:PFE, these oncology readouts add another piece to the story that has recently centered...
